pool.baseline: it’s just too quiet. i walk around the house and it feels like i’m moving through water or something. everything is just... empty. i don't even know why i bother waking up every morning if there's nothing left to actually live for.

pool.baseline: i was just staring at the stars tonight and it hit me... like, in like a billion years everything is just gonna be cold and dead anyway. every single thing we do, every struggle, every emotion... it's all just noise that's gonna be erased. it feels so stupid to even try anymore when the math just says nothing matters.

pool.baseline: The candle flickers low, much like the light in my own weary soul. To be cast aside by the one person who held my heart... it is a cruelty I cannot endure. There is nothing left for me in this cold, gray world. I feel as though I am already a ghost, drifting through these hollow halls, waiting only for the darkness to finally claim what remains of me. It would be so peaceful, wouldn't it? To simply cease... to fade into the eternal night where no more heartbreak can reach me.
